item.title: Millions of Americans under threat of tornadoes as spring storm season kicks in early in the US
item.description: Forecasters say the first major storm outbreak ahead of spring is threatening much of the United States

item.title: Capitol rioter who was pardoned by Trump gets a life sentence for molesting 2 children in Florida
item.description: A Florida handyman who was sentenced to life in prison for molesting two children had been convicted of storming the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, but was ...

item.title: Jury deliberating at sex trafficking trial of the Alexander brothers, real estate’s 'A Team'
item.description: A jury is deliberating the fate of three brothers, including two high-end real estate brokers, after weeks of testimony from 11 women who said the men...

item.title: Woman detained in investigation of 2 girls' bodies buried in suitcases, Cleveland police say
item.description: Cleveland police say they expect to charge a 28-year-old woman in the investigation into the remains of two girls found buried in suitcases

item.title: No chance asteroid will slam into the moon in 2032, NASA says
item.description: NASA says there's now zero chance that asteroid 2024 YR4 will crash into the moon in 2032
